Intelligence Gathering Through Open Sources

The amount of information available through public sources is staggering � and most people have no idea how exposed they are. Our OSINT investigations leverage advanced search techniques, specialized tools, and deep web analysis to build comprehensive intelligence profiles.

Investigation Services

  • Personal digital footprint assessment
  • Corporate due diligence and background research
  • Threat actor tracking and attribution
  • Social media analysis and monitoring
  • Dark web exposure assessment
  • Domain and infrastructure reconnaissance
  • Data breach exposure verification
  • Pre-litigation intelligence gathering

Use Cases

Attorneys conducting pre-litigation research. Organizations performing due diligence on potential partners. Individuals assessing their personal exposure. Security teams tracking threat actors targeting their organization.
